title: BlueArchive Font
description: The font of the game "Blue Archive"! It is recommended to use the "modern UI!" mod!
body:
The game font of "Blue Archive" exclusive to "Minecraft" (it is recommended to install modern UI to eliminate the pixelated look).
Compared with the original game:
![In game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8d4ce90835c4d67ee763ed840dbb5af6434e51a_0.webp)
![BlueArchive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5d3f7d46acf063707afaf7c0f9a9463ff4943e5_0.webp)

After installing modern UI (It's exactly the same!)

![modernUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45e5d7dfbfa3ff0c4938638eb025b18a2a3acb8d_0.webp)
